sentences.target: Je colle les photos dans l'album.

translations.fr: Je colle les photos dans l'album.
translations.en: I'm sticking the photos in the album.
translations.es: Estoy pegando las fotos en el álbum.
translations.de: Ich klebe die Fotos ins Album.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把照片贴到相册里。
translations.yue: 我而家喺相簿度貼啲相。
translations.pt: Estou a colar as fotografias no álbum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang dán ảnh vào album.
translations.nl: Ik plak de foto's in het album.
translations.hi: मैं एल्बम में फ़ोटो चिपका रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg limer bildene inn i albumet.
translations.id: Saya sedang menempelkan foto ke album.
translations.sv: Jag klistrar in fotona i albumet.
translations.da: Jeg limer billederne ind i albummet.
translations.ja: アルバムに写真を貼っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb 'colle'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking the direct object 'les photos' and a locative PP 'dans l'album'.
Definite article, plural; determines the noun 'photos' as a specific set (direct object).
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the noun phrase serving as the direct object of 'colle'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement 'dans l'album'.
Cliticized definite article (elision of 'le/la' before a vowel or mute h), singular; determines 'album'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu colles l'affiche sur la porte.

translations.fr: Tu colles l'affiche sur la porte.
translations.en: You're sticking the poster on the door.
translations.es: Estás pegando el póster en la puerta.
translations.de: Du klebst das Poster an die Tür.
translations.it: Stai attaccando il poster sulla porta.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把海报贴在门上。
translations.pt: Estás a colar o cartaz na porta.
translations.he: אתה מדביק את הפוסטר על הדלת.
translations.vi: Bạn đang dán poster lên cửa.
translations.nl: Je plakt de poster op de deur.
translations.hi: तुम दरवाज़े पर पोस्टर चिपका रहे हो।
translations.id: Kamu sedang menempelkan poster di pintu.
translations.sv: Du klistrar upp affischen på dörren.
translations.ja: ドアにポスターを貼っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; functions as the subject of 'colles'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking the direct object 'l'affiche' and PP 'sur la porte'.
Cliticized definite article (elision before vowel), singular; determines 'affiche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'colles'.
Preposition indicating placement; introduces the PP 'sur la porte'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

translations.en: We're going to stick this here.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把这个贴在这里。
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים להדביק את זה כאן.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ dán cái này ở đây.
translations.hi: हम इसे यहाँ चिपकाने वाले हैं।
translations.id: Kita akan menempelkan ini di sini.
translations.sv: Vi ska klistra fast det här här.
translations.da: Vi skal klistre det her fast.
translations.ja: これをここに貼るつもりだ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/collective, grammatically 3rd person singular); subject of 'va'.
Auxiliary 'aller' in the near-future construction (futur proche), present 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive 'coller'.
Infinitive main verb; complements the auxiliary 'va' in a periphrastic future.
Demonstrative pronoun; direct object of the verb 'coller'.
Locative adverb specifying place; modifies the predicate.

sentences.target: Je colle l'étiquette sur le pot de confiture.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔl le.ti.kɛt syʁ lə po də kɔ̃.fi.tyʁ/

translations.fr: Je colle l'étiquette sur le pot de confiture.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔl le.ti.kɛt syʁ lə po də kɔ̃.fi.tyʁ/
translations.en: I'm sticking the label on the jam jar.
translations.es: Estoy pegando la etiqueta en el tarro de mermelada.
translations.de: Ich klebe das Etikett aufs Marmeladenglas.
translations.it: Sto attaccando l'etichetta sul barattolo di marmellata.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把标签贴在果酱罐上。
translations.ru: Я приклеиваю этикетку на банку с вареньем.
translations.pt: Estou a colar a etiqueta no frasco de compota.
translations.he: אני מדביק את המדבקה על צנצנת הריבה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang dán nhãn lên hũ mứt.
translations.ar: أنا ألصق الملصق على مرطبان المربى.
translations.nl: Ik plak het etiket op de jampot.
translations.uk: Я клею етикетку на банку з варенням.
translations.hu: Ráragasztom a címkét a lekváros üvegre.
translations.hi: मैं जैम के जार पर लेबल चिपका रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Przyklejam etykietę na słoik z dżemem.
translations.el: Κολλάω την ετικέτα στο βάζο με μαρμελάδα.
translations.id: Saya sedang menempelkan label pada toples selai.
translations.ro: Lipesc eticheta pe borcanul cu dulceață.
translations.cs: Lepím etiketu na sklenici s marmeládou.
translations.ja: ジャムの瓶にラベルを貼っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'colle'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking the direct object 'l'étiquette'.
Cliticized definite article (elision before vowel), singular; determines 'étiquette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'colle'.
Preposition introducing the PP 'sur le pot de confiture'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'pot'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur' and head of the NP 'pot de confiture'.
Preposition introducing the noun complement 'confiture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the noun 'pot' introduced by 'de'.
